title: CustomDeathMessage
description: Have fun custom death messages in your server, change it as you want !
body:
CustomDeathMessage add fun custom death message  to your server like MCCIsland or Stray DeathMessage but with more fun and jokes in :)
Discover it by yourself ! 

Configure the DeathMessages in the deathmessage.yml file

Source Code 
https://github.com/IceLoup/CustomDeathMessage
